overview.name: Hermes Agent — Multi-Agent Reasoning Layer
overview.description: The Karpathy LLM Council pattern: multiple agents debate a problem, reach consensus, then execute. White Crew challenges assumptions, Black Crew generates solutions. Hermes arbitrates and synthesizes.
overview.integration_point: archonx/kernel.py execute_task() — routed when task.requires_council == True

file_structure.archonx/agents/hermes/__init__.py: Package init, exports HermesAgent, Council classes
file_structure.archonx/agents/hermes/white_council.py: WhiteCouncil — challenge and critique layer (uses WhiteCrew souls)
file_structure.archonx/agents/hermes/black_council.py: BlackCouncil — solution generation layer (uses BlackCrew souls)

fields.objective: str — what needs to be decided/solved
fields.context: dict — relevant state, constraints, prior results
fields.max_rounds: int = 3 — maximum debate rounds before forced consensus
fields.requires_unanimous: bool = False — if True, must reach full consensus

fields.rollback_plan: list[dict] — undo steps if execution fails

HermesAgent.description: Top-level orchestrator. Receives CouncilTask, runs debate, synthesizes consensus, kicks off execution.

constructor.params: white_council: WhiteCouncil, black_council: BlackCouncil, consensus_engine: ConsensusEngine, llm_client: Any, cost_guard: CostGuard

methods.async deliberate(task: CouncilTask) -> C: Run full debate cycle, return consensus
methods._arbitrate(rounds: list[DebateRound]) ->: Hermes synthesis logic — finds common ground
methods._should_continue(round: DebateRound) ->: Convergence check — stop if score > 0.85 or max rounds hit

WhiteCouncil.description: Challenge crew. Finds flaws, edge cases, risks. Always adversarial to the current proposal.
WhiteCouncil.key_method: async challenge(proposal: str, context: dict) -> str — returns critique/challenge text
WhiteCouncil.prompt_pattern: You are [agent_soul]. Your job is to find EVERY flaw in this proposal. Be adversarial. Return structured critique.

BlackCouncil.description: Solution crew. Generates solutions, counters challenges, finds paths forward.
BlackCouncil.key_method: async solve(challenge: str, context: dict) -> str — returns solution proposal
BlackCouncil.prompt_pattern: You are [agent_soul]. You've been given this challenge. Generate the BEST solution. Be constructive. Return actionable proposal.

ConsensusEngine.description: Weighted voting to reach consensus from debate rounds.

algorithm.step_1: Score each round for convergence (0-1) using semantic similarity of positions
algorithm.step_2: Weight later rounds higher (recency bias: round_n weight = 1 + 0.2*n)
algorithm.step_3: If weighted average > 0.85: consensus reached, extract winning position
algorithm.step_4: If max_rounds exceeded: Hermes override using synthesis of final round
algorithm.step_5: If requires_unanimous and no consensus: return failure, escalate to human

kernel_integration.routing_logic: if task.get('requires_council') or task.get('complexity') == 'high': use HermesAgent
kernel_integration.cost_guard_check: Always check CostGuard BEFORE running council (council = 3-6 LLM calls per round)

error_handling.llm_timeout: Retry once, then use cached position from previous round
error_handling.no_consensus: After max_rounds: Hermes forced synthesis + log 'HERMES_FORCED_CONSENSUS' event
error_handling.cost_guard_block: Raise HermesBudgetExceeded, log task for later retry
error_handling.council_member_fail: Use remaining members, note degraded council in ConsensusResult

test_requirements: test_multi_round_debate: Council needs 3 rounds to converge
test_hermes_forced_tiebreak: max_rounds exceeded, Hermes takes over
test_cost_guard_blocks_council: Budget exceeded before council starts
test_council_member_failure: One member fails, council degrades gracefully
builder_notes: DO NOT implement a new LLM client — use kernel's existing self.llm_client
DO NOT hardcode any API keys — all flow through kernel's secure config
Keep council prompt templates in archonx/agents/hermes/prompts/ as .txt files (not in code)
ConsensusEngine semantic similarity: use simple keyword overlap for MVP; embedding-based similarity for Phase 3
Full Karpathy LLM Council (embedding-based, full multi-vectorstore) is Phase 3 scope — MVP is single-LLM debate
